programmes.show_description: Christmas romance with Deirdre Mullins. A struggling dancer plans a Christmas Ball to help save her aunt's manor house. But when work calls, will her feet bring her to where her heart is? (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

A Dream of Wild Horses: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in wild horses, and places all responsibility on his daughter.
